description: Made to order daily. Choose from our full lineup — banh mi, bakery, and handcrafted drinks.

banhmi.label: The Deli
banhmi.headline: Banh Mi.
banhmi.meta: Served on a toasted baguette. Swap for a bagel — Everything, Jalapeno Cheddar, Cheddar, or Plain.

items.name: Traditional
items.desc: Jambon, white ham, pâté, pickled daikon & radish, cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber, egg cream mayo.

items.name: Grilled Chicken
items.desc: Grilled chicken thigh, pickled daikon & radish, cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber, egg cream mayo.

items.name: Grilled Pork
items.desc: Chargrilled lemongrass pork, pickled daikon & carrot, fresh cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber.

items.name: Pork Meatball
items.desc: House-made pork meatballs, pickled daikon & radish, cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber, egg cream mayo.

items.name: Fried Tofu
items.desc: Crispy fried tofu, pickled daikon & radish, cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber, hoisin sauce. Vegetarian.

items.name: Spring Mix & Avocado
items.desc: Spring mix, avocado, pickled daikon, cucumber, jalapeño, cilantro, egg cream mayo. Vegetarian.

items.name: Beef Short Rib
items.desc: Slow-braised short rib, pickled daikon & radish, cilantro, jalapeño, cucumber, egg cream mayo.

bagels.label: Bakery
bagels.headline: Bagels.
bagels.meta: Baked fresh in-house every morning. $2.75 each.

items.name: Plain
items.desc: Classic crust, lightly toasted. The everyday pick.

items.name: Everything
items.desc: Sesame, poppy, garlic, onion, flake salt. Big flavor.

items.name: Asiago
items.desc: Baked with aged asiago on top. Sharp and savory.

items.name: Jalapeño Cheddar
items.desc: Melted cheddar crust with sliced jalapeño. A kick of heat.

items.name: Cookies
items.desc: Chocolate Chunk · White Chocolate Macadamia · Oatmeal Raisin · Royale
